product_title: Skullcandy Hesh Wireless Active Noise-canceling Over-ear Headphones With Microphone, Bluetooth, True Black (s6hhw-n740)
consensus_summary: The Skullcandy Hesh wireless headphones deliver solid value with effective active noise cancellation and comfortable fit for extended wear. Users appreciate the battery life and sound quality, though some report durability concerns and occasional connectivity issues. Best suited for casual listening and commuting rather than professional audio work.
pros: Good active noise cancellation for the price point
Comfortable fit for long listening sessions
Decent bass response and overall sound quality
cons: Build quality feels plastic and less premium
Ear cup padding wears down over time
Limited app functionality compared to competitors
Can sound slightly bassy for audiophiles
red_flags: Hinge and cable connection points prone to breakage
Occasional Bluetooth disconnection issues requiring repairing
